summary: Summary: Speaker2 (frustration) opens the call welcoming Speaker1 to Northwest Airlines and asks how he can help; Speaker1 (frustration) reports his bag is lost. As they work through details both show frustration; Speaker2 (frustration) attempts to calm Speaker1 but Speaker1 escalates to anger when he believes staff ignored his distinctive bag. Speaker2 (frustration) offers a $50 courtesy check, which provokes Speaker1 (surprise, anger). Speaker1 continues with anger and frustration, insisting $50 is unacceptable, stressing the inconvenience beyond money, and demands to speak with a supervisor while threatening legal action. Speaker2 remains firm (frustration) and later becomes excited when explaining the complaint process and terms, but Speaker1's frustration intensifies, culminating in an exchange where Speaker1 accuses the airline of poor communication.
